channel.title: Assert and Reflect
channel.description: Testing is about creating confidence. Practical guides, architecture strategy, and reflections on quality.

item.title: Orchestrating Autonomous Test Workflows with n8n
item.description: Moving beyond linear CI scripts to dynamic, event-driven test orchestration using n8n and AI agents.

item.title: Testing the Unpredictable — Strategies for LLM Validation
item.description: When software becomes non-deterministic, your testing philosophy must shift from "assert equal" to "evaluate probability."

item.title: Testing as a Risk Model
item.description: Reframe testing as risk management—prioritize what matters and communicate uncertainty clearly.

item.title: Designing Reliable UI Tests
item.description: Practical principles for UI tests that don't flake, don't slow you down, and actually catch bugs.

item.title: Confidence vs Defect Counting
item.description: Why the best measure of testing success isn't how many bugs you find—it's how much confidence you create.
